SQLLite.SQL: SELECT CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) >= TO_DATE(SD.ITEM_VALUE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS "IsActive" FROM SYSTEM_DATA SD WHERE SD.ITEM = 'NEW_NUMBERING_LIVE_DATE' AND SD.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = 0

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper edsAdmin ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2
